candidates.observable_statement: GridCore Manufacturing has broken ground on a new power transformer production plant in Oklahoma.

candidates.physical_implication: Construction of a new manufacturing facility.

candidates.observable_statement: The facility is expected to increase output for utility customers pursuing grid modernization, substation replacement, and transmission buildout.

candidates.physical_implication: Expansion of manufacturing capabilities to meet utility demands.

candidates.observable_statement: The company said the new site will add significant annual manufacturing capacity once fully operational.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Potential for increased revenue from higher production capacity.
candidates.physical_implication: Operational readiness of a new manufacturing plant.

candidates.observable_statement: The agreement is expected to support a sustained production ramp over the coming quarters.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Investment in production capacity to meet the demand from the supply agreement.
candidates.physical_implication: Possible expansion of production facilities or increased operational capacity.
